slot1notfound: Missing item in slot: Weapon. Default item set - Revolver. Use "Items" button to change.
slot2notfound: Missing item in slot: Equipment 1. Default item set - Empty Slot. Use "Items" button to change.
slot3notfound: Missing item in slot: Equipment 2. Default item set - Empty Slot. Use "Items" button to change.
gamegoing.subtitle: Wait until the end to join
lobbyfull.subtitle: Wait for free space
notenoughplayersready: Timer starts when 2 players are ready (%1$s left)
playerleft: One or more players have left. Rebuilding lobby in: %1$s
unknownvalue: Unknown inventory value. Seems like you've entered a wrong ID.
notavailable: You can't change your inventory now.
rules.basics:
Welcome to Intervention! The game is designed for 5-12 players, it is recommended to use voice chat (mod, group call, etc.) or game chat. 

The goal is to score as many points as possible for kills or using equipment. Click the "Items" button to customize your equipment. 
Players do not see each other's equipment, so the only way to guess what your opponents are going to do next is to watch their gaze. 
Avert suspicion from yourself, because the player who killed you will receive an additional 25 points for each of your kills. 
A round lasts up to 2.5 minutes, after which a random player dies. The round is forced to end if someone uses a weapon. 
The last surviving player gets 100 points. 


Good luck!
random.title: Random equipment
random.body:
Your current equipment and weapon will be replaced with random ones.

 Continue?
random.selected: Your weapon and equipment were randomized. Good luck!
foundsameitem: Removed same item in the other slot
revolver.name: Revolver
revolver.lore: Target a player and use to shoot
marksman.name: Marksman
marksman.howtouse: Properties: You can mark a player. Use marksman again to kill marked target. Change selected slot to remove mark from target. You don't need to look at the target to activate mark. Mark has a 2초. cooldown.
marksman.lore: Target a player and use to mark. Use aganin to shoot
sawedoff.name: Sawed-off
sawedoff.howtouse: Properties: Upon first use you will shoot two random players and gain 150 points (regardless of whether they die after or not). Cooldown is raised by 8 seconds and sawed-off shoots like a regular weapon after first use.
sawedoff.lore: Target a player and use to shoot. You don't need to aim for first use
panicattack.name: Panic Attack
panicattack.howtouse: Properties: Can't be used until less than 50%% of players are alive.
panicattack.lore: Target a player and use to shoot. Can't be used until less than 50%% of players are alive.
knife.name: Knife
knife.howtouse: Properties: Stabs closest target when used. Shoot sound doesn't play.
sniperrifle.name: Rifle
sniperrifle.howtouse: Properties: Aiming at target enables laser scope. Convenient.
sniperrifle.lore: Target a player and use to shoot
silenced.name: Silenced Pistol
silenced.lore: Target a player and use to shoot
muff.name: Muff
muff.howtouse: Properties: Has a 1 in 3 chance to charge a blank. Blank can't kill a target or give a kill reward.
muff.lore: Target a player and use to shoot
glasscannon.name: Glass Cannon
glasscannon.howtouse: Properties: Kill reward lowers by 200/(player count) each round. Example: 10 players in the lobby, -20 kill reward each round.
glasscannon.lore: Target a player and use to shoot
glasscannon.lowered: Glass Cannon: Kill reward lowered: %1$s next shot
taxpayer.name: Taxpayer
taxpayer.howtouse: Properties: Can't be used until owner has at least 70 points.
taxpayer.lore: Target a player and use to shoot. Can't be used until owner has at least 70 points
taucannon.name: Tau Cannon
taucannon.howtouse: Properties: Each time you use or cancel an item your cooldown is increased by 1초. and kill reward is increased by 5 for current round.
taucannon.lore: Target a player and use to shoot. Using items increases cooldown and kill reward for this round
taucannon.uppered: Tau Cannon: Item used. Cooldown increased by 1초., kill reward increased by 5 for this round
scythe.name: Scythe
empty.name: Enpty Slot
empty.use: You gain 10 extra points after each kill.
shield.name: Shield
shield.use: Use: You block a hit if you are shot this round. A successful block will give you 10 points and -3초. to cooldown this round. Can be used 2 times per game.
mirror.name: Mirror
mirror.use: Use: You deflect a hit if you are shot this round. A successful deflection will give you 30 points and count as a kill if it happens. Can be used once per game.
cursedmirror.name: Cursed Mirror
cursedmirror.use: Use: You deflect a hit into a random target (which includes you). A successful deflection will give you 15 points. Can be used once per game.
cursedmirror.lore: Use to deflect a hit into a random player
bet.name: Bet
bet.use: Use: Each round you can predict the death of one of the players. For a correct prediction, you will receive 50 points. If you use your weapon, prediction cancels. Target a player and use to predict their death. Uses unlimited.
bet.lore: Target a player and use to predict their death. It's on the house
clock.name: Clock
clock.use: Use: Select to see remaining weapon cooldown.
clock.lore: Select to see remaining weapon cooldown.
shuffle.name: Shuffle
shuffle.reward: Shuffle Reward: -0.5초. to cooldown permanently (-1.5초. max)
shuffle.use: Use: Next round all players will be shuffled. You get -0.5초. to cooldown till the end of the game for every shuffle (up to -1.5초.). Can be used 3 times per game.
spark.name: Pocket Spark
spark.use: You get 5 points and -1초. to cooldown every round of you're alive.
sheriff.name: Sheriff Badge
sheriff.use: Use: Target a player and use to see their weapon and equipment. Can be used once per round.
sheriff.lore: Target a player and use to see their weapon and equipment
helpshield.name: Distant Shield
helpshield.use.reward: Distant Shield Self Reward: 20, -4초. to cooldown
helpshield.use: Use: Target a player and use to protect them from being hit. If you protect a player from death, they will get 10 points, and you will get 20 points and -4초. to cooldown this round. Protection cancels if you use your weapon. Can be used 2 times per game.
helpshield.lore: Target a player and use to protect them from being hit
revive.name: Second Chance
revive.use: Use: Target a dead player and use to revive them this round. Their cooldown is set to 0 but their kill reward is set to 30. Can be used once per game.
revive.lore: Target a dead player and use to revive them this round. They will get a scythe
pills.name: Pills
pills.use: Use: You fall asleep  next round, mimicking death. While sleeping, no items (including weapons) affect you. You wake up in the next round. Can be used once per game.
pills.lore: Use to fall asleep next round. While asleep you can't be attacked.
blank.name: Blank
blank.use: Use: Target a player and use to cancel their next shot. You get 20 points for each of your blanks used. Can be used 3 times per game.
blank.lore: Target a player and use to cancel their next shot.
blank.already: This player already has a blank.
queenofspades.name: Queen of Spades
queenofspades.use: You gain 25 points and 1 kill point every 2 rounds. Spade symbol appears above you every odd round.
queenofspades.lore: You gain 25 points and 1 kill point every 2 rounds.
queenofhearts.name: Queen of Hearts
queenofhearts.use: Removes 50 points from a random player and gives them to you every 3 rounds. Heart symbol appears above you every 2 rounds.
queenofhearts.lore: Removes 50 points from a random player and gives them to you every 3 rounds.
queenofhearts.reward: Queen of Hearts: 50, removed 50 points from random player
queenofclubs.name: Queen of Clubs
queenofclubs.use: Speeds up your base weapon cooldown by 0.5초. every round. Club symbol appears above you every 5 rounds.
queenofclubs.lore: Speeds up your base weapon cooldown by 0.5초. every round.
queenofclubs.reward: Queen of Clubs: -0.5초. to base weapon cooldown
queenofdiamonds.name: Queen of Diamonds
queenofdiamonds.use: Doubles your points and quadriples your kills every 4 rounds. Diamond symbol appears above you every 3 rounds.
queenofdiamonds.lore: Doubles your points and quadriples your kills every 4 rounds.
queenofdiamonds.reward: Queen of Diamonds: Doubled your points, quadripled your kills
joker.name: Joker
joker.use: Your points increase by x1.5 each time someone uses an item on you. Works up to 3 times per game.
joker.lore: Your points increase by x1.5 each time someone uses an item on you. Works up to 3 times per game.
extralives.consumed: You died, but extra life saved you. %1$s lives left
